metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the Claude Model Changer plugin and related tooling

plugins.name: claude-model-changer
plugins.description: Automatic Claude model routing (haiku/sonnet/opus) based on task complexity. 30 task categories, 5 hooks, 27 slash commands, multi-language detection (EN/HU/DE) with Hungarian morphology, quota-aware downgrade, custom statusline, context bloat detector, agent teams role detection, git commit/push hooks, /undo, /whatif simulator, weekly digest, multi-profile switching, fallback feedback loop, Karpathy skills auto-sync, Prometheus telemetry export. Saves 40-60% on mixed workloads.
